page: lessons/01-hello-model/index.html (driven as the student, in Chromium)

messages.content: Give me John 3:16, word for word, in the King James Version.

message.content: "For God so loved the world, that he gave his only begotten Son, that whosoever believeth on him should not perish, but have everlasting life." — **John 3:16 (KJV)**
